name: Geometry Dash AI Learner
description: An AI agent that learns to play Geometry Dash levels using NEAT (NeuroEvolution of Augmenting Topologies). Watch as the AI evolves and improves its gameplay over multiple generations.

enable_ai.name: Enable AI Training
enable_ai.description: Start or stop the AI training process

population_size.name: Population Size
population_size.description: Number of AI agents per generation

vision_grid_size.name: Vision Grid Size
vision_grid_size.description: Size of the AI's vision grid (NxN)

fitness_weight_progress.name: Fitness Weight - Progress
fitness_weight_progress.description: Weight for level completion percentage in fitness calculation

fitness_weight_time.name: Fitness Weight - Time Alive
fitness_weight_time.description: Weight for time alive in fitness calculation
